## Milestone 1: [Deliverable Name]

> **Goal**: [What the user can test when this milestone is complete]
> **Acceptance Criteria**: [How the user validates the deliverable]
> **Demo Gallery**: `docs/<project>/<phase>/demos/milestone-1/` — collects every task's Demo Artifact for this milestone
> **Review Checkpoint**: User reviews and approves before Milestone 2 begins (run `/milestone-complete <project>` to trigger the approval gate)
> **Status**: To Do | In Progress | Done | Blocked

### TASK-001: [Title]
- **Status**: To Do | In Progress | Done | Blocked
- **Agent**: [agent(s) — e.g. `data-pipeline (impl), test-validator (QA)`, `architect (phase review), data-pipeline (impl), test-validator (QA)`, `content-writer (docs)`, or `none — manual user process`]
- **Complexity**: Low | Medium | High
- **Depends on**: None | TASK-XXX
- **Context**: One-sentence summary of the relevant architectural decisions (e.g. which module, which pattern, which data contract). Used by `/implement` to avoid reading TDD for simple tasks.
- **Description**: What needs to be done
- **Acceptance Criteria**:
  - [ ] Criterion 1
  - [ ] Criterion 2
- **Demo Artifact**: [REQUIRED before task can be marked Done. Describe what a non-developer can look at to judge the work — a screenshot, CLI recording, sample output file, or URL. Save to `docs/<project>/<phase>/demos/milestone-1/TASK-001.<ext>` and link here. If the task is pure infrastructure with no user-visible effect, it does not belong as a standalone task — bundle it with the next user-visible task per CLAUDE.md's milestone rules.]
- **Notes**: Any implementation hints or constraints
